title: Overview of data available from the 2023 Census | Stats NZ
content:
## Overview of data available from the 2023 Census
03 October 2024, 10:45am
This page provides a brief guide to the data available from the 2023 Census.
See an overview of the types of census data available and where to find out more information about it, including:
- census topics, concepts, and variables
- classification levels.
- Overview of data available from the 2023 Census Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 2.2 MB
